confidence_rationale: Video is educational/promotional content showing LapAR platform overview, equipment setup, and task demonstrations. No actual trainee FLS task performance is present. No scoring rubric applies. Content includes product marketing, instructor presentation, labeled equipment overview, and brief endoscopic task visualizations without full performance execution.
cannot_determine: Completion time (no timed task execution visible)

demonstrated_techniques: LapAR system hardware setup and integration
Endoscopic visualization of surgical models (appendage anatomy)

video_type_summary: This is a professional promotional and educational video for the LapAR (Laparoscopic Virtual Reality) training platform by Inovus Medical. It showcases the complete system components, setup procedures, and brief task demonstrations intended for trainees or program administrators learning about the platform. No individual trainee performance is being scored.
recommendation: DO NOT SCORE. This video does not contain an individual FLS task performance. It is educational/marketing material. For FLS scoring, provide a video showing an actual trainee executing one of the five FLS tasks (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture) with clear timing and performance metrics.
